zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.於大約1469年出生在英國達勒姆索可本時，他的父親William Conyers Esq.34歲，母親Lady Anne Bigod33歲。他於大約1487年11月21日與Anne Markenfield結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年11月5日在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.于大约1469年出生在英国達勒姆索可本时，他的父亲William Conyers Esq.34岁，母亲Lady Anne Bigod33岁。他于大约1487年11月21日与Anne Markenfield结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年11月5日在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. was born about 1469, in Sockburn, Durham, England, his father, William Conyers Esq., was 34 and his mother, Lady Anne Bigod, was 33. He married Anne Markenfield about 21 November 1487. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 5 November 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. est né environ 1469, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Conyers Esq., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Bigod, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anne Markenfield environ 21 novembre 1487. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. um 1469 in Sockburn, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Conyers Esq. 34 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Bigod 33. Er hat um 21. November 1487 Anne Markenfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1497 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. è nato il circa 1469 nel Sockburn, Durham, England, il suo padre, William Conyers Esq., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Bigod, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anne Markenfield circa 21 novembre 1487. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 novembre 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.が約1469年にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで生まれた時，父William Conyers Esq.は34歳，母Lady Anne Bigodは33歳であった。約1487年11月21日にAnne Markenfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年11月5日に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.(이)가 대략 1469년 영국 뒤람 속번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Conyers Esq.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Bigod(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1487년 11월 21일 Anne Markenfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 11월 5일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1469, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Conyers Esq., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Bigod, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Markenfield aproximadamente 21 de novembro de 1487. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. родился около 1469 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени William Conyers Esq. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Bigod, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Markenfield около 21 ноября 1487 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 ноября 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. nació aproximadamente 1469, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Conyers Esq., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Bigod, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anne Markenfield aproximadamente 21 de noviembre de 1487. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
